checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt is present and doesn't specifically block AI bots
robots.txt references a sitemap
sitemap.xml found with ~21 URLs
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
Found 2 JSON-LD blocks: unknown, WebPage
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 68 divs with only 10 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 120/169 interactive elements have labels
Forms are well-structured: 3/4 inputs have names
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
Good heading hierarchy: 11 headings, well-structured
2 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
1 links with generic text ('click here', 'read more')
Good link accessibility: 142/145 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Server accepts DELETE on main page (no method validation)

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~65,599 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 2% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 15 — clean structure
CSS class attributes consume ~4,727 tokens (7% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.08–$0.98 per load ($0.41–$4.92 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation, search
All 15 images have alt attributes (0 descriptive, 15 decorative)
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
14 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
6 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 79ms
Compact payload: 36KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 0 scripts, 0 styles, 0 images
Compression enabled: br
